name: agent-pipeline
description: A multi-agent feature pipeline for Claude Code: Map -> Plan -> Code -> Test -> Review -> Explain. Ships features locally or in scheduled cloud sessions, with tests, an auto-fix loop, a review verdict, and a learning walkthrough. Every handoff is a contract (repo, task, diff, evidence) with stop rules for high-risk actions, all handed off through a shared .pipeline/ folder. Includes /grade-tests: mutation testing that grades how well your suite actually asserts behaviour.
